shots.action: Minh runs into the bright art classroom, stops, and waves excitedly at the camera. with other students visible in the background
shots.camera_movement: Wide shot, static, then medium shot on Minh
shots.dialogue: Hi! I'm Minh! Today I'm going to show you my FAVORITE class — Art!
shots.veo_prompt: Pixar-style 3D animation, wide shot establishing a bright school art classroom with colorful drawings on walls, a 6-year-old Vietnamese boy with short black hair and a light blue school uniform runs into the center, stops, and waves with a huge grin, warm morning sunlight, 8 seconds, with diverse 6-year-old students sitting at desks and busy with art projects in the background
shots.dialogue_vn: Chào các bạn! Mình là Minh! Hôm nay mình sẽ giới thiệu cho các bạn tiết học YÊU THÍCH nhất của mình — Mỹ thuật!

shots.action: Minh spins around with arms wide, then holds up a finger knowingly. with other students visible in the background
shots.camera_movement: Medium shot, slow tracking as he spins
shots.dialogue: In art class, we learn about something really cool… called ART PRODUCTS!
shots.veo_prompt: Pixar-style 3D animation, medium shot of a 6-year-old Vietnamese boy in a blue uniform spinning joyfully with arms wide in a colorful classroom, he stops and holds up one finger with a playful, knowing expression, bright and cheerful atmosphere, 8 seconds, with diverse 6-year-old students sitting at desks and busy with art projects in the background
shots.dialogue_vn: Trong giờ mỹ thuật, chúng mình được học về một điều cực kỳ thú vị... đó là SẢN PHẨM MỸ THUẬT!

shots.action: Cô Hòa points to the art board; Minh points to his butterfly painting proudly. with other students visible in the background
shots.camera_movement: Medium two-shot, panning to the artwork
shots.dialogue: That one's MINE! I made that last week!
shots.veo_prompt: Pixar-style 3D animation, medium two-shot of a kind Vietnamese art teacher in a paint-splattered apron pointing at a corkboard of art, beside her a 6-year-old boy points excitedly at a colorful watercolor butterfly painting, proud expressions, soft classroom lighting, 8 seconds, with diverse 6-year-old students sitting at desks and busy with art projects in the background, featuring Cô Hòa, a Vietnamese teacher in her late 40s wearing a light blue patterned Áo Dài with purple trousers
shots.dialogue_vn: Bức tranh đó là của MÌNH đấy! Mình đã vẽ nó vào tuần trước!

shots.action: Minh explains visual art, pointing to a clay bird on a shelf. with other students visible in the background
shots.camera_movement: Close-up on Minh, then pan to the clay bird
shots.dialogue: Visual Art means… things we make that you LOOK at. Like paintings. And drawings. And — sculptures!
shots.veo_prompt: Pixar-style 3D animation, close-up of a cheerful 6-year-old boy talking and gesturing, camera pans to show a small clay bird sculpture on a wooden shelf in a sunlit classroom, vibrant colors, clear and detailed rendering, 8 seconds, with diverse 6-year-old students sitting at desks and busy with art projects in the background
shots.dialogue_vn: Mỹ thuật tạo hình nghĩa là... những thứ chúng mình làm ra để các bạn NGẮM nhìn. Như tranh vẽ này, hình vẽ này, và cả — những bức tượng nữa!

shots.action: Minh scribbles a bright yellow sun with a crayon.
shots.camera_movement: Extreme close-up on hands and paper
shots.dialogue: Cô Hòa also teaches us how to USE all the materials! Like crayonsâ¦
shots.veo_prompt: Pixar-style 3D animation, extreme close-up of a child's hands using a bright yellow wax crayon to draw a sun on a white sheet of paper, scattered pencils and art supplies on a wooden table in the background, high detail, 8 seconds
shots.dialogue_vn: Cô Hòa còn dạy chúng mình cách SỬ DỤNG tất cả các loại vật liệu nữa! Như là bút màu sáp...

shots.action: Minh sketches a stick figure; Lena adds a flower and they both laugh.
shots.camera_movement: Medium two-shot at table
shots.dialogue: She always makes mine look better.
shots.veo_prompt: Pixar-style 3D animation, medium shot of a 6-year-old Vietnamese boy and a girl with pigtails sitting at a desk, they are drawing together and laughing, the girl adds a flower to the boy's drawing, warm and friendly classroom vibe, 8 seconds
shots.dialogue_vn: Cô ấy luôn giúp bức tranh của mình trông đẹp hơn.

shots.action: Minh uses a cardboard tube as a telescope and looks at the camera.
shots.camera_movement: Close-up through the tube
shots.dialogue: And then there's APPLIED ART! This is when we take… OLD stuff… and make it into NEW art!
shots.veo_prompt: Pixar-style 3D animation, close-up of a 6-year-old boy looking through a cardboard toilet paper roll like a telescope, one eye visible through the tube, colorful recycled materials in the blurred background, playful and creative mood, 8 seconds
shots.dialogue_vn: Và còn có cả MỸ THUẬT ỨNG DỤNG nữa! Đây là khi chúng mình dùng... những đồ vật CŨ... để tạo ra những tác phẩm MỚI!

shots.action: Lena shows off her owl made from a water bottle; Minh looks amazed.
shots.camera_movement: Medium shot, focus on the owl
shots.dialogue: Lena made that owl from a water bottle. A WATER BOTTLE!
shots.veo_prompt: Pixar-style 3D animation, a 6-year-old girl with pigtails holds up a creative owl craft made from a plastic water bottle and bottle caps, beside her a 6-year-old boy looks on with a funny expression of amazement, cluttered art station background, 8 seconds
shots.dialogue_vn: Bạn Lena đã làm con cú đó từ một vỏ chai nước đấy. Một VỎ CHAI NƯỚC luôn!

shots.action: Minh cuts a zigzag edge on red paper with safety scissors.
shots.camera_movement: Close-up on hands and scissors
shots.dialogue: We also do… paper cutting… and pasting.
shots.veo_prompt: Pixar-style 3D animation, close-up of child-safety scissors with orange handles cutting a zigzag pattern into a piece of bright red paper, small hands moving carefully, scraps of colored paper on the table, focused lighting, 8 seconds
shots.dialogue_vn: Chúng mình còn học cả... cắt và dán giấy nữa.

shots.action: Minh holds up a finished paper collage of a landscape.
shots.camera_movement: Medium shot, dolly-out
shots.dialogue: You cut shapes… and you stick them down… and suddenly it's a PICTURE!
shots.veo_prompt: Pixar-style 3D animation, medium shot of a 6-year-old boy proudly holding up a colorful paper collage of green hills and a yellow sun, he grins at the camera, art supplies on the table in front of him, bright classroom setting, 8 seconds
shots.dialogue_vn: Các bạn cắt các hình khối... rồi dán chúng lại... và bất ngờ chưa, nó đã trở thành một BỨC TRANH!

shots.action: Minh points to the sculptor and fashion designer on the poster.
shots.camera_movement: Pan across the poster sections
shots.dialogue: Now — who makes art? You might think only sculptors make art… or fashion designers…
shots.veo_prompt: Pixar-style 3D animation, medium shot of a 6-year-old boy pointing to a colorful wall poster showing a sculptor and a fashion designer, camera pans across the detailed illustrations on the poster, child's full head and shoulders are visible, NO cropping of the head, educational classroom environment, 8 seconds
shots.dialogue_vn: Vậy thì — ai là người tạo ra nghệ thuật? Các bạn có thể nghĩ chỉ có nhà điêu khắc... hay nhà thiết kế thời trang mới làm nghệ thuật...

shots.action: Minh turns to camera and points at himself, then at the viewer. with other students visible in the background
shots.camera_movement: Medium close-up on Minh
shots.dialogue: But actually? Art is made by… ART LOVERS! Anyone who loves art can make it!
shots.veo_prompt: Pixar-style 3D animation, medium close-up of a 6-year-old Vietnamese boy with a bright smile, he points to himself and then points directly at the camera with a welcoming gesture, soft cinematic lighting, encouraging mood, 8 seconds, with diverse 6-year-old students sitting at desks and busy with art projects in the background
shots.dialogue_vn: Nhưng thực ra? Nghệ thuật được tạo ra bởi... NHỮNG NGƯỜI YÊU NGHỆ THUẬT! Bất cứ ai yêu nghệ thuật đều có thể làm ra nó!

shots.action: Minh enters the park and watches Grandpa Nam paint on a canvas.
shots.camera_movement: Wide shot, then medium on the pair
shots.dialogue: Art is for ALL ages!
shots.veo_prompt: Pixar-style 3D animation, sunny park setting with a large tree, an elderly Vietnamese man with silver hair sits on a stool painting a landscape on an easel, a 6-year-old boy walks up to him and watches with curiosity, peaceful afternoon light, 8 seconds
shots.dialogue_vn: Nghệ thuật là dành cho TẤT CẢ mọi lứa tuổi!

shots.action: Grandpa Nam adds a bird to the painting; Minh whispers in awe.
shots.camera_movement: Close-up on the canvas and their faces
shots.dialogue: Grandpa Nam is 70 years old… and he STILL paints!
shots.veo_prompt: Pixar-style 3D animation, close-up of an elderly man's hand painting a small bird on a canvas with a fine brush, beside him a young boy watches with wide, awestruck eyes, dappled sunlight through tree leaves, 8 seconds
shots.dialogue_vn: Ông Nam đã 70 tuổi rồi... mà ông VẪN vẽ tranh đấy!

shots.action: Minh draws a house; Cô Hòa offers guidance from behind. with other students visible in the background
shots.camera_movement: High angle shot looking down at the desk
shots.dialogue: We draw in the classroom! Cô Hòa teaches us how to see thingsâ¦ and put them on paper.
shots.veo_prompt: Pixar-style 3D animation, high angle view of a 6-year-old boy sketching a house in a sketchbook at a classroom desk, a kind teacher in an apron leans in to give gentle advice, soft golden afternoon light, 8 seconds, with diverse 6-year-old students sitting at desks and busy with art projects in the background, featuring Cô Hòa, a Vietnamese teacher in her late 40s wearing a light blue patterned Áo Dài with purple trousers
shots.dialogue_vn: Chúng mình vẽ tranh ngay tại lớp học! Cô Hòa dạy chúng mình cách quan sát mọi thứ... và thể hiện chúng lên trang giấy.

shots.action: Minh shows his sketch of a large tree while sitting in the garden. with other students visible in the background
shots.camera_movement: Medium shot panning the outdoor class
shots.dialogue: And sometimes… we go OUTSIDE to draw!
shots.veo_prompt: Pixar-style 3D animation, a group of children sitting on stools in a lush school garden with a large tree and fountain, a 6-year-old boy holds up his sketchbook showing a bold drawing of the tree, bright daylight, 8 seconds, with many students sitting on stools and sketching in the background
shots.dialogue_vn: Và thỉnh thoảng... chúng mình còn ra NGOÀI TRỜI để vẽ nữa!

shots.action: A butterfly lands on Lena's sketchbook; she freezes and smiles. with other students visible in the background
shots.camera_movement: Close-up on Lena and the sketchbook
shots.dialogue: Outside is the BEST because nature gives you so many things to draw.
shots.veo_prompt: Pixar-style 3D animation, close-up of a 6-year-old girl with pigtails holding her sketchbook still as a colorful butterfly lands on the page, she has a magical, gentle smile, flowers in the blurred garden background, 8 seconds, with many students sitting on stools and sketching in the background
shots.dialogue_vn: Vẽ ở ngoài trời là TUYỆT nhất vì thiên nhiên mang lại cho chúng mình rất nhiều cảm hứng để vẽ.

shots.action: Minh picks up crayons and draws a rainbow with joyful energy. with other students visible in the background
shots.camera_movement: Medium close-up, focusing on the drawing and Minh's happy face
shots.dialogue: Crayons: For COLOR!
shots.veo_prompt: Pixar-style 3D animation, medium close-up of a cheerful 6-year-old Vietnamese boy with short straight black hair and a light blue school uniform, he is happily and enthusiastically drawing a vibrant rainbow with different colored crayons on a white paper, big joyful smile, bright and colorful art classroom, 8 seconds, with diverse 6-year-old students sitting at desks and busy with art projects in the background
shots.dialogue_vn: Bút màu sáp: Để tạo ra MÀU SẮC!

shots.action: Minh holds up a paintbrush dramatically and looks satisfied. with other students visible in the background
shots.camera_movement: Medium close-up
shots.dialogue: And THIS — is for REAL paintings!
shots.veo_prompt: Pixar-style 3D animation, medium close-up of a 6-year-old boy holding up a clean paintbrush like a hero's sword, he has a satisfied and confident expression, art classroom background with paint tubes and clay, 8 seconds, with diverse 6-year-old students sitting at desks and busy with art projects in the background
shots.dialogue_vn: Và ĐÂY — là dành cho những bức họa định cao!

shots.action: The whole class stands in front of the art wall; Minh gestures to the work.
shots.camera_movement: Very slow pull-back wide shot
shots.dialogue: And THAT… is Art class. Visual art. Applied art. Pencils, crayons, clay, paper, paint…
shots.veo_prompt: Pixar-style 3D animation, wide shot pulling back to reveal a group of happy children and their teacher standing in front of a wall covered in their artwork, paintings, collages, and drawings, bright and celebratory lighting, 8 seconds, featuring Cô Hòa, a Vietnamese teacher in her late 40s wearing a light blue patterned Áo Dài with purple trousers
shots.dialogue_vn: Và ĐÓ... chính là giờ Mỹ thuật. Mỹ thuật tạo hình. Mỹ thuật ứng dụng. Bút chì, màu sáp, đất sét, giấy, sơn...

shots.action: Minh points at the camera with a huge grin as everyone waves.
shots.camera_movement: Close-up on Minh, everyone waving in background
shots.dialogue: Art is for EVERYONE. Even YOU!
shots.veo_prompt: Pixar-style 3D animation, final close-up of a 6-year-old boy pointing his finger directly at the camera with a big, joyful smile, in the blurred background children and the teacher are waving goodbye, heartwarming ending, 8 seconds
shots.dialogue_vn: Nghệ thuật dành cho TẤT CẢ MỌI NGƯỜI. Kể cả BẠN đấy!
